title: cheiranthus cinereus
intro: Cheiranthus cinereus, also known as the Dusky Wallflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a expectorant and a diaphoretic, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Cheiranthus cinereus include its ability to ease congestion and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, often made by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water to create a soothing tea.
